channel.title: Cli on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Cli on Arrans github.io

item.title: pystardust/ani-cli
item.description: A cli tool to browse and play anime

item.title: yt-dlp/yt-dlp
item.description: A feature-rich command-line audio/video downloader

item.title: jesseduffield/lazygit
item.description: simple terminal UI for git commands

item.title: n8n-io/n8n
item.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

item.title: OpenHands/OpenHands
item.description: 🙌 OpenHands: AI-Driven Development

item.title: ultralytics/ultralytics
item.description: Ultralytics YOLO 🚀

item.title: sxyazi/yazi
item.description: 💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.

item.title: mikefarah/yq
item.description: yq is a portable command-line YAML, JSON, XML, CSV, TOML, HCL and properties processor

item.title: sharkdp/bat
item.description: A cat(1) clone with wings.

item.title: noborus/ov
item.description: 🎑Feature-rich terminal-based text viewer. It is a so-called terminal pager.

item.title: google-gemini/gemini-cli
item.description: An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.

item.title: jarun/nnn
item.description: n³ The unorthodox terminal file manager

item.title: charmbracelet/bubbletea
item.description: A powerful little TUI framework 🏗

item.title: privatenumber/tsx
item.description: ⚡️ TypeScript Execute | The easiest way to run TypeScript in Node.js

item.title: rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI
item.description: Fast, scriptable CLI for the App Store Connect API. Automate TestFlight, builds, submissions, signing, analytics, screenshots, subscriptions, and more. JSON-first, no interactive prompts

item.title: blackwell-systems/shelfctl
item.description: PDF/EPUB library CLI/TUI backed by GitHub Release assets (Git LFS alternative). On-demand per-file downloads, metadata catalog, migrate/split bloated repos.

item.title: sharkdp/fd
item.description: A simple, fast and user-friendly alternative to ‘find’

item.title: leo-arch/clifm
item.description: 💾 The shell-like, command line terminal file manager

item.title: continuedev/continue
item.description: ⏩ Source-controlled AI checks, enforceable in CI. Powered by the open-source Continue CLI

item.title: Aider-AI/aider
item.description: aider is AI pair programming in your terminal

item.title: beetbox/beets
item.description: music library manager and MusicBrainz tagger

item.title: Infisical/infisical
item.description: Infisical is the open-source platform for secrets, certificates, and privileged access management.

item.title: ClementTsang/bottom
item.description: Yet another cross-platform graphical process/system monitor.

item.title: dlvhdr/gh-dash
item.description: A rich terminal UI for GitHub that doesn’t break your flow.

item.title: pvolok/mprocs
item.description: Run multiple commands in parallel

item.title: x-cmd/x-cmd
item.description: Shell Superpowers for AI Agents.

item.title: dundee/gdu
item.description: Fast disk usage analyzer with console interface written in Go

item.title: bitwarden/clients
item.description: Bitwarden client apps (web, browser extension, desktop, and cli).

item.title: dlvhdr/diffnav
item.description: A git diff pager based on delta but with a file tree, à la GitHub.

item.title: muesli/duf
item.description: Disk Usage/Free Utility - a better ‘df’ alternative

item.title: gildas-lormeau/SingleFile
item.description: Web Extension for saving a faithful copy of a complete web page in a single HTML file

item.title: sigoden/aichat
item.description: All-in-one LLM CLI tool featuring Shell Assistant, Chat-REPL, RAG, AI Tools & Agents, with access to OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama, Groq, and more.

item.title: spf13/cobra
item.description: A Commander for modern Go CLI interactions

item.title: steipete/imsg
item.description: CLI for Apple’s Messages.app so your agent can send and receive text messages/iMessages.

item.title: yorukot/superfile
item.description: Pretty fancy and modern terminal file manager

item.title: Zouuup/landrun
item.description: Run any Linux process in a secure, unprivileged sandbox using Landlock. Think firejail, but lightweight, user-friendly, and baked into the kernel.

item.title: Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard
item.description: The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.

item.title: alebcay/awesome-shell
item.description: A curated list of awesome command-line frameworks, toolkits, guides and gizmos. Inspired by awesome-php.

item.title: saulpw/visidata
item.description: A terminal spreadsheet multitool for discovering and arranging data

item.title: emersion/mako
item.description: A lightweight Wayland notification daemon

item.title: Adembc/lazyssh
item.description: A terminal-based SSH manager inspired by lazydocker and k9s - Written in go

item.title: projectdiscovery/httpx
item.description: httpx is a fast and multi-purpose HTTP toolkit that allows running multiple probes using the retryablehttp library.

item.title: JohannesKaufmann/html-to-markdown
item.description: ⚙️ Convert HTML to Markdown. Even works with entire websites and can be extended through rules.

item.title: emersion/slurp
item.description: Select a region in a Wayland compositor

item.title: leoafarias/fvm
item.description: Flutter Version Management: A simple CLI to manage Flutter SDK versions.

item.title: dedene/claw-wrap
item.description: A secure credential proxy for CLI tools. Executes tools with secrets on behalf of sandboxed processes - credentials never enter the sandbox.

item.title: padok-team/yatas
item.description: 🦉🔎 A simple tool to audit your AWS/GCP infrastructure for misconfiguration or potential security issues with plugins integration

item.title: blob42/gosuki
item.description: A lightweight, open-source, privacy-first bookmark manager that unifies your bookmarks across multiple browsers, syncs them in real time (locally or P2P), requires no extensions, and stores everything locally.

item.title: algorismo-au/lanekeep
item.description: Governance guardrails and insights for AI coding agents

item.title: hartwork/resolve-march-native
item.description: 🐌 Tool to determine what GCC or (experimental!) Clang flags -march=native would resolve into

item.title: mrusme/neonmodem
item.description: Neon Modem Overdrive (https://codeberg.org/mrus/neonmodem)

item.title: solworktech/md2pdf
item.description: A CLI utility that generates PDFs from Markdown. Features: syntax highlighting (for code blocks), dark, light and custom themes, TOC autogeneration, tables, pagination control (using horizontal lines - especially useful for presentations), page Footer (consisting of author, title and page number), support of non-Latin charsets and multiple fonts

item.title: pimutils/vdirsyncer
item.description: 📇 Synchronize calendars and contacts.

item.title: altdesktop/playerctl
item.description: 🎧 mpris media player command-line controller for vlc, mpv, RhythmBox, web browsers, cmus, mpd, spotify and others.

item.title: lasantosr/intelli-shell
item.description: Like IntelliSense, but for shells

item.title: GianlucaP106/mynav
item.description: Workspace and session management TUI

item.title: tvrzna/emptty
item.description: Dead simple CLI Display Manager on TTY

item.title: avamsi/climate
item.description: “CLI Mate” autogenerates CLIs from structs / functions (nested subcommands, global / local flags, help generation, typo suggestions, shell completion etc.)

item.title: integrii/flaggy
item.description: Idiomatic Go input parsing with subcommands, positional values, and flags at any position. No required project or package layout and no external dependencies.

item.title: XandAI-project/Xandai-CLI
item.description: Your offline AI coding assistant in the terminal using ollama and LM studio

item.title: emersion/grim
item.description: Grab images from a Wayland compositor

item.title: muesli/gitty
item.description: Contextual information about your git projects, right on the command-line

item.title: ChocolateLoverRaj/rust-fp
item.description: Fingerprint library, dbus interface, CLI, and PAM module for unlocking Linux with fingerprint sensors. Currently for Chromebooks.

item.title: nate-craft/yt-feeds
item.description: A fast, simple, and lightweight TUI application to watch subscription feeds from YouTube

item.title: arran4/eightbyeight
item.description: golang based dithering experiments

item.title: arran4/sentencestats
item.description: Tools to plot character usage in sentences

item.title: arran4/rotatingcircles
item.description: Generates an optical illusion: Rotating circles

item.title: arran4/go-playerctl
item.description: 🎧 mpris media player command-line controller for vlc, mpv, RhythmBox, web browsers, cmus, mpd, spotify and others.

item.title: thehowl/claws
item.description: Awesome WebSocket CLient - an interactive command line client for testing websocket servers

item.title: arran4/go-subcommand
item.description: Generates dependencyless go command line argument subcommand system

item.title: arran4/dirtools
item.description: Some directory tools, such as separating out all of a file extension into mirror directories

item.title: arran4/md2png
item.description: Very basic generated md2png

item.title: arran4/txtar
item.description: txtar enhanced and with a cli tool

item.title: arran4/mvcommon
item.description: Tool for moving files into a folder where they have a common prefix

item.title: arran4/mostcomm
item.description: A cli utility for finding the most common and sorting by length, lines-sets in a text file

item.title: arran4/podcast-cdr-manager
item.description: CLI tool to help manage podcast subscriptions for burning to CDROMs / CDR / CDRW

item.title: arran4/strings2
item.description: Some golang string helper functions focused around case transformation but other things in the future.

item.title: arran4/move-dups-script
item.description: Simple program to move dups nothing really interesting - Once off go project which could have been a shell script

item.title: arran4/shineyshot
item.description: A simple screenshotting tool with several user modes

item.title: nathabonfim59/gitid
item.description: A tool to stop sending work commits with your personal email

item.title: arran4/go-pattern
item.description: image.Image patterns

item.title: arran4/go-lojban-password-gen
item.description: Lojban password generator - Generate passwords that use lojban

item.title: arran4/go-evaluator
item.description: A simple evaluation markup with a simple parser too.

item.title: arran4/editorconfig-guesser
item.description: Generates reasonable .editorconfig files for source files.

item.title: arran4/directoryGrouperBySize
item.description: Tools that help you group directories to a paricular size range. (ie getting things to fit on dvds.)

item.title: arran4/trace-redirects
item.description: Very simple cli tool for tracing redirects on a site - nothing you couldn’t do with curl

item.title: arran4/mdsplit
item.description: Splits markdown files into chunks suitable for processing with other tools or making into slides

item.title: arran4/anytype-to-linkwarden
item.description: Simple application for migrating AnyType bookmarks to Linkwarden
